description: New tools: web_search.py (DuckDuckGo), data_tools.py (pandas CSV/JSON), scheduler_tools.py (task CRUD via db_manager), knowledge_tools.py (knowledge CRUD), writing_tools.py (templates and formatting). All tools follow the existing pattern of returning dicts with 'success' key and wrapping external imports in try/except.
steps: Create J.A.R.V.I.S_system/core/tools/web_search.py: Functions search_web(query, max_results=5), search_news(query, max_results=5), get_page_summary(url). Use duckduckgo_search library (DDGS class). Wrap import in try/except - if unavailable return {'success': False, 'error': 'duckduckgo-search not installed'}. Return structured results: list of {title, url, snippet}.

Create J.A.R.V.I.S_system/core/tools/data_tools.py: Functions read_csv_file(file_path), describe_data(file_path), filter_data(file_path, column, operator, value), calculate_stats(file_path, column). Use pandas with try/except fallback to csv module. Return formatted string results.

Create J.A.R.V.I.S_system/core/tools/scheduler_tools.py: Functions add_task(title, description, priority, category, due_date), list_tasks(status, category), update_task(task_id, **kwargs), complete_task(task_id), get_overdue_tasks(), get_today_tasks(). Use DatabaseManager for MySQL/SQLite access. All operations safe via SQLAlchemy ORM.

Create J.A.R.V.I.S_system/core/tools/knowledge_tools.py: Functions add_knowledge(title, content, category, tags, source), search_knowledge(query, limit=10), get_knowledge_by_category(category), delete_knowledge(knowledge_id). Use DatabaseManager + Knowledge model.

Create J.A.R.V.I.S_system/core/tools/writing_tools.py: Functions email_template(tone, subject, recipient), proposal_template(title, context), caption_template(platform, topic), format_academic(text), format_casual(text). Pure Python template helpers, no external deps.
Update J.A.R.V.I.S_system/core/tools/__init__.py: Add imports for new tool modules (lazy/conditional imports to avoid crashes if deps missing)
acceptance_criteria: python -c 'from core.tools.web_search import search_web, search_news, get_page_summary' succeeds
python -c 'from core.tools.data_tools import read_csv_file, describe_data, calculate_stats' succeeds
python -c 'from core.tools.scheduler_tools import add_task, list_tasks, get_today_tasks' succeeds
python -c 'from core.tools.knowledge_tools import add_knowledge, search_knowledge' succeeds
python -c 'from core.tools.writing_tools import email_template, proposal_template, caption_template' succeeds
Each tool function returns a dict with 'success' key when called (even if underlying service unavailable)
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PRE-AIAgentJarvis/J.A.R.V.I.S_system && python -c "from core.tools.web_search import search_web; from core.tools.data_tools import read_csv_file; from core.tools.scheduler_tools import add_task; from core.tools.knowledge_tools import add_knowledge; from core.tools.writing_tools import email_template; print('All new tools import OK')"

cd /projects/sandbox/PRE-AIAgentJarvis/J.A.R.V.I.S_system && python -c "from core.tools.writing_tools import email_template; r = email_template('formal', 'Meeting Request', 'Dr. Smith'); print(r['success'], len(r.get('template', '')) > 0)"
findings: All tools import and function correctly. duckduckgo-search library emits a RuntimeWarning about being renamed to 'ddgs' but still works. Database tools require migrations to be run first (create_all_tables()) before CRUD operations work. The data/ directory with jarvis.db is created at runtime and should not be committed. nullslast() in scheduler_tools requires SQLAlchemy 2.0+ (confirmed installed as 2.0.51).
